title: thymus × bulsanensis
intro: Thymus × bulsanensis, also known as Balsam Thyme, is a hybrid plant derived from the Thymus genus, known for its distinct fragrance and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Balsam Thyme include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Balsam Thyme can be found in teas, essential oils, and topical creams, and are often used to relieve colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
